pages.name: Champions
pages.text: Unique $(rune)bosses$() guard special arenas and structures - armored champions, primal terrors, and worse. Each has a pattern; learn it, dodge the wind-ups, and punish the openings.

pages.name: Cataclysm-Tier
pages.text: The deadliest foes are realm-shaking $(warn)Cataclysm bosses$(). Come with top gear, healing, and a plan - and never alone if you can help it. Their drops are among the best in the world.
